name: Capstone — first-time user goes from blank account to sent quote in one continuous flow
description: Stitches together the new-user funnel: phone OTP login → /assistant cold load → onboarding ask → name + business captured → first quote drafted → locked + sent → email queued → public-quote brand reflects the just-captured business name. Verifies that no piece of identity propagation needs a manual refresh.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Just landed on / via a referral; phone in hand to verify.

preconditions: No prior session; user record does not yet exist for +15125550100

steps.action: On /, taps 'Get started', enters phone +15125550100, taps Send code
steps.expect: OTP SMS dispatched (in dev, the code is in the OtpStore); user is taken to /verify
POST /auth/verify-otp creates User { phoneNumber, name: undefined }; sets pm_session cookie; redirects to /dashboard
Skeleton renders; KPIs settle to all zeros; topbar greeting reads 'Hey, there 👋'; sidebar Quotes badge is hidden (count is 0)

steps.action: Clicks My assistant in the sidebar
steps.expect: /assistant cold load; empty-state hero 'Start a conversation with Bossie'; composer ready
Bossie's onboarding ask fires (no LLM call); user.name still undefined
Backend persists user.name='Diego' + businessIdentity.businessName='Riley Roofing Co.'; assistant: 'Got it, Diego — what can I help you with?'

steps.action: Sends 'Quote a fence repair for the Patels — labor $350 plus materials $80'
steps.expect: create_quote action_card with summary 'Fence repair — Patel'; total $430.00
Quote → status='sent'; email dispatched to the customer; from-name should include 'Diego' (after P1.6 ships)
Sidebar Quotes badge reads '1'; KPI Quotes Pending=1; topbar greeting reads 'Hey, Diego 👋'; sidebar footer shows DR avatar + 'Diego' + 'Riley Roofing Co.'

steps.action: (Asha) opens the public quote URL in the email
steps.expect: Eyebrow reads 'RILEY ROOFING CO.'; greeting 'Hi Asha — here's your quote.'; contact-back footer 'Questions? Reach Diego: <phone>'

emails.subject: Your quote from Diego — fence repair
emails.expect: Brand reads as Riley Roofing Co. (NOT Paperwork Monsters); customer's first name in greeting

evaluationCriteria.check: Brand consistency through the funnel: skeleton → real dashboard → assistant → public quote all share the visual identity. The customer never sees PAPERWORK MONSTERS.
From OTP code to sent quote is <2 minutes for a confident user; onboarding adds two turns max
Identity propagation is live: name captured in HandleChatMessage's onboarding short-circuit reaches the public quote BE projection without any cache invalidation step
Each step's heading hierarchy reads coherently; OTP code input uses inputmode=numeric + autocomplete=one-time-code
